title: MC Chat * Discord
description: Chat on discord from your minecraft chat!
body:
A minecraft mod that lets you chat on discord in one of two ways:
- Talk on the lachadev channel, using a verccel proxy (default, the proxy will be open sourced soon)
- Install the vencord or betterdiscord plugin [here](https://github.com/aurickk/Discord-Chat-Integration/releases/tag/V1.0.2)

*`/toggle` to switch between minecraft and discord chat in game*

**A fork of Aurick's mod, licensed under MIT 0**
